facilities.name: Canterbury Recreation Complex
facilities.desc: The Canterbury Recreation Complex is the ideal place to meet your recreational needs. The facility boasts a 25 metre five lane swimming pool with sauna, an NHL sized ice rink in the Brian Kilrea Arena and the Canterbury Community Centre. Our pool offers a wide selection of aquatic programs including public swims, aquafitness and swimming lessons. Canterbury Recreation Complex offers a variety of programs for all ages. Through a partnership with the Canterbury Community Association, children's and adult programs are also available to the Canterbury community. These programs include: an after school program, adult and senior fitness programs, as well as art, dance, martial arts and yoga programs for all ages.

facilities.name: Diane Deans Greenboro Community Centre
facilities.desc: Snuggled in the heart of the Greenboro/South Keys district, the Diane Deans Greenboro Community Centre opens its doors to welcome all. We offer a wide variety of recreation programs for all ages, stages and interests. There is a state of the art fitness studio, cardio and weight room, group cycling studio, dance and yoga studio, a full sized gymnasium ideal for sports and a variety of multi-purpose rooms. Consider renting our spaces for birthday parties, meetings, sports leagues, and much more. You will also find the Greenboro District Library located within the facility. Outside, just across Lorry Greenberg Drive, there are public tennis courts and walking trails and out back is a large park with more walking trails, sports fields, an amazing play structure, and wading pool. Greenboro Community Centre; it's a great place to be.
facilities.address:
363 Lorry Greenberg Drive
Ottawa ON K1T 3P8
Canada

facilities.name: Dovercourt Recreation Centre
facilities.desc: Dovercourt Recreation Association is a not for profit charitable organization (Registered Charity No. 11944 4263 RR0001) dedicated to enhancing the quality of life in our community through recreation programs. In 1983, the City of Ottawa began work on the planning of a new community centre to replace the Westboro Community Centre. Dovercourt Recreation Association was actively involved in the process, and when the new centre opened in 1987, Dovercourt was given the responsibility of managing the new centre through a service agreement. While we are part of the City of Ottawa’s recreation system, Dovercourt Recreation Association is empowered to choose what programs it runs to meet the community’s needs, and how those programs are delivered. Our motto is "A Community Working For the Community, Une communauté qui travaille pour la communauté". Staff, volunteers, clients, local community groups and businesses working together…that’s Dovercourt.
facilities.address:
411 Dovercourt Avenue
Ottawa ON K2A 0S9
Canada

facilities.desc: Centrally located in downtown Ottawa, Jack Purcell Community Centre has an 18 metre warm water pool, which offers regular aquatic programming and specialized programs for individuals with disabilities. The facility also has a fully accessible weight room, five meeting rooms of various sizes and access to an adjacent school gym. Jack Purcell offers a variety of programs for seniors, individuals with disabilities, and swimmers. Through a partnership with the Jack Purcell Recreation Association, children's and adult programs are also available to the Centretown community. These programs include: an after school program, children's camps, an adult fitness program, and adult art, dance, yoga, and sports programs.

facilities.name: Minto Recreation Complex - Barrhaven
facilities.desc: The Minto Recreation Complex - Barrhaven was recently listed by Chatelaine Magazine as one of the top 10 best indoor pools in Canada! Read the Best Indoor Pools in Canada article. The Minto Recreation Complex - Barrhaven includes a six lane, 25 metre lap pool with three metre and one metre diving boards, and an access ramp (Pool Rentals, please contact mrcb@ottawa.ca). Two NHL sized ice rinks (one rink is accessible), with accessible change rooms (please contact City Wide Allocations sports@ottawa.ca for ice rentals). Outside find an artificial turf sports field designed to meet CFL and FIFA design standards (please contact City Wide Allocations sports@ottawa.ca for field rentals). Artwork suspended from the ceiling named Mr. Kurokawa. Minto, an active sponsor of community initiatives, is proud to be associated with the City of Ottawa's Community Champions Program.

facilities.name: Nepean Sportsplex
facilities.desc: The Nepean Sportsplex hosts 30-plus regional, provincial, national and international sporting events as well as 35 special events per year. Our facility serves over 1.5 million clients annually, who enjoy any of the following amenities: An impressive aquatic centre with a 50 metre Olympic pool with diving towers and springboards, a 25-metre family pool, a children’s wading pool and a therapeutic whirlpool. The centre also features three North American size rinks: The Yzerman and the Allen J. MacDonald arenas, and a 10-sheet curling centre. A 3,000 sq. feet weight room and fitness centre including four squash courts, a studio and gymnasium as well as a large outdoor Sports field area featuring two baseball diamonds, a soccer field, the Minto sports field turf, a lawn bowling turf and pavilion as well as outdoor fitness trails. With 18 meeting and banquet rooms ranging from 468 to 8,640 sq. ft. and available space of 62,000 sq. ft. for conventions, the Nepean Sportsplex has become known as a top-notch location to hold tradeshows and special events including the annual Christmas craft show. Our Seniors Centre offers activities for retired adults 50+, while the Visual Arts Centre provides all levels of visual arts programs. General interest programs complete the options available.
facilities.address:
1701 Woodroffe Avenue
Ottawa ON K2G 1W2
Canada

facilities.name: South Fallingbrook Community Centre
facilities.desc: The South Fallingbrook Community Centre offers programs for all ages throughout the year. Fitness, sports, dance, After School, PD days, and a wide variety of preschool programs are available during the day, evenings and weekends. Our facility is outfitted with a gymnasium, year-round boarded rink area, three tennis/pickleball courts and soccer fields. Our facility has rooms and a gymnasium for meetings, parties or sporting events. We also partner with local community associations to offer programming and rental services right in your own backyard. Join us at your local community building or school for a variety of dynamic programs and services.

The facility also boasts a brand new 25 metre lap pool with an accessible ramp and a new 32 metre waterslide!

facilities.name: Terry Fox Athletic Facility
facilities.desc: Track and field complex This outdoor sports facility features an extensive outdoor track and field complex featuring a lighted, international standard 400-metre polyurethane-surfaced eight-lane running track, along with multiple throwing and jumping event areas. These include high jump, long jump, javelin, shot put, hammer & discuss. Sports fields The facility has three lit, premium-classed, grass sports fields, which can be used for a variety of activities such as soccer, lacrosse, ultimate Frisbee and special events. Mooney's Bay Ski Centre During the winter, the facility turns into a cross-country ski centre - Mooney's Bay Ski Centre - featuring five-kilometres of track-set lit trails, for classic and skate-skiing, and includes a ski school for all ages and abilities.

facilities.name: Tony Graham Recreation Complex - Kanata
facilities.desc: Tony Graham Recreation Complex – Kanata offers a wide selection of recreation programs for all ages including children's summer camps, preschool programs and fitness classes. The complex includes recreation program space and two full-size arenas (Tom Flood Arena and Garry Burke Rink) with spectator seating. Ideal to rent for meetings, gatherings or social events. The Tony Graham Recreation Complex – Kanata is located in Walter Baker Park surrounded by various sports fields, park, a splash pad and toboggan hill.
facilities.address:
100 Charlie Rogers Place
Ottawa ON K2V 1A2
Canada
facilities.specialHoursHtml:
• August 30 to September 12
    • The facility is closed for annual maintenance.
    • The arenas remain open.

facilities.name: Walter Baker Sports Centre
facilities.desc: Walter Baker Sports Centre in Barrhaven includes a fitness centre with treadmills, bikes, ellipticals, rowing machines, stair climber, cable machines, free weights and independent sound system and televisions. Our pool is a 8-lane 25m pool; diving tank with two 1m and 3m diving boards; warm teaching pool with ramp access and preschool pool. Two full-sized ice rinks (Arena A and B) with spectator seating.
facilities.address:
100 Malvern Drive
Ottawa ON K2J 2G5
Canada

facilities.name: Westcliffe Community Building
facilities.desc: The Westcliffe Community Building offers City recreation programs, summer camps and is available for private rentals. It is located in front of a park and there is a small splash on the right-hand side of the building.
